body: Great layout for weekly planning. Paper quality could be a bit thicker but overall very happy with it.
Absolutely love this bullet journal. The dot grid is perfectly spaced and the cover is sturdy. Already ordered a second one.
The kraft cover looks nice but the binding fell apart after two weeks. Pages started coming loose. Disappointed.
Cute design but very poor quality. The spine cracked the first time I opened it flat. Would not buy again.
Decent notebook for the price but the paper is quite thin and ink bleeds through. Fine for pencil use only.
These brush markers are incredible. The colors are vibrant and the tips have held up beautifully after heavy use.
Love the pastel colors. Adhesive is strong enough to stay put but still peels off cleanly. Good size variety in the pack.
Best mechanical pencil I have owned. The grip is comfortable and the lead advance mechanism is smooth. Zero complaints.
Smooth writing and great color range. One pen in the set had a slightly scratchy tip but the rest were perfect.
Ink is nice but the clips on the caps broke pretty quickly. Good for desk use, not great if you carry them around.
Such a fun set. Patterns are unique and the tape tears cleanly without jagged edges. Already bought two more sets as gifts.
Looks good in photos but feels very flimsy in person. The compartments are too shallow to hold anything upright.
Plastic feels cheap and one of the dividers snapped the first week. Expected better for the price.
Solid cork board. Hangs easily and the pins included are a nice bonus. Would have given five stars but the frame warped slightly.
Perfect weekly layout with enough space for daily tasks and notes. Has completely replaced my digital calendar.
